title: pocketdimensions:pocketdimensions-handbook-title-admin
text: Admin workflows Pocket Dimensions can run as an admin-only utility, a player-facing survival/RP feature, or a hybrid service. Configure this in ModConfig/pocket_dimensions.json. Command privileges remain the recovery and admin path; the Pocket Directory, Waystones, elevators, and pocket block policy use capability modes for normal player workflows. Dimension lifecycle and transfer internals are documented in DimensionLib Basics. Capability modes - Privilege: only players with the configured privilege can use that action. This is the default for every action. - OwnerOrPrivilege: the pocket owner or a privileged admin can use that action. - OwnerMemberOrPrivilege: the owner, listed members, or a privileged admin can use that action. Members are stored on the pocket stack in ModData/pocketdimensions/waystone-links.json. - Public: any online player can use that action, with the configured privilege still acting as an admin override. - Disabled: non-privileged access is disabled for that action; the configured privilege remains the staff override. Config keys - CreatePocketCapabilityMode: controls Pocket Directory pocket creation. - CreateLayerCapabilityMode: controls Pocket Directory and elevator-confirmed layer creation. - EditLayerCapabilityMode: controls layer display-name edits. - DirectoryVisibilityCapabilityMode: controls which pockets and layers appear in the directory. - DirectoryTeleportCapabilityMode: controls directory Enter buttons. - UseWaystoneCapabilityMode: controls right-click entry through bound external Pocket Waystones. - UseElevatorCapabilityMode: controls PageUp/PageDown layer travel on Pocket Elevators. - UsePocketBlocksCapabilityMode: controls use interactions inside pocket dimensions. - MutatePocketBlocksCapabilityMode: controls placing and breaking normal blocks inside pocket dimensions. Protected Pocket anchors remain protected.
